difficulty.reason: Seedling instant color, edible petals, cold-tolerant, blooms for months

growth_stages.name: Transplant
growth_stages.look_for: Seedling already has flowers from the nursery

prompt.en: Put the little plant in the hole and press the soil around it -- instant flowers!
prompt.da: Saet den lille plante i hullet og tryk jorden fast -- blomster med det samme!

growth_stages.name: Blooming
growth_stages.look_for: Colorful flowers in purple, yellow, white, or multi-colored faces

prompt.en: Pick the prettiest flowers -- we'll brush them with egg white and sugar to make candy flowers!
prompt.da: Pluk de smukkeste blomster -- vi pensler dem med aeggehvide og sukker og laver slikblomster!

growth_stages.name: Fading
growth_stages.look_for: Fewer flowers, plant getting leggy in summer heat

prompt.en: Pinch off the old droopy flowers so new ones can come!
prompt.da: Knib de gamle slappe blomster af, saa nye kan komme!

human_readable.en: Keep evenly moist. Water regularly in warm weather.
human_readable.da: Hold jaevnt fugtig. Vand regelmaessigt i varmt vejr.

harvest.notes: Edible petals: crystallize with egg white and sugar. Blooms best in cool weather, fades in summer heat.

companion_plants.notes: Purely ornamental companion. Adds immediate color at bed edges.

message.en: Violas are thirsty -- water them to keep the flowers coming!
message.da: Stedmoderblomster er toerstige -- vand dem for at holde blomsterne i gang!
